decision_options.decision_meaning: Accept the validated/admissible proposal for a later bounded implementation-prep path.
decision_options.notes: Acceptance does not itself implement. It authorizes a later bounded implementation-prep unit.
No repair or implementation follows unless a new human command opens a new proposal.
Edits require a new typed edit packet and re-review/revalidation.

decision_options.decision_meaning: Defer decision without closing the proposal.
decision_options.notes: Default safe decision; preserves proposal as validated/admissible but undecided.

decision_options.decision_meaning: Freeze the proposal as a reference object only.
decision_options.notes: Reference-only closure forbids implementation from this branch.
Creates a new narrower proposal request; current proposal remains not accepted.
Creates alternate proposal request; current proposal remains not accepted.

decision_options.decision_meaning: Close this source branch for the current registry only.
decision_options.notes: Does not claim global impossibility; closes this branch under current registry state.
